basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR-IARI) Young Professional-II (YP-II) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of ICAR-IARI. A total of 1 Young Professional-II (YP-II) vacancy has been announced through the ICAR-IARI Young Professional-II (YP-II) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: As per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MCA/M.tech/B.tech/BCA/MBA (any specialization) Graduates with at least 60% marks
qualification.details: MCA/M.tech/B.tech/BCA/MBA (any specialization) Graduates with at least 60% marks. Diploma or certificate course in digital marketing (desirable). Experience in Digital marketing (desirable).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR-IARI Young Professional-II (YP-II) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Young Professional-II (YP-II) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ICAR-IARI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ICAR-IARI Young Professional-II (YP-II) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MCA/M.tech/B.tech/BCA/MBA (any specialization) Graduates with at least 60% marks. Diploma or certificate course in digital marketing (desirable). Experience in Digital marketing (desirable).

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: As per rules.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Young Professional-II (YP-II) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR-IARI Young Professional-II (YP-II) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Young Professional-II (YP-II) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR-IARI Young Professional-II (YP-II) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 06 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-II (YP-II) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MCA/M.tech/B.tech/BCA/MBA (any specialization) with at least 60% marks. A diploma or certificate in digital marketing and experience in the field are desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Young Professional-II (YP-II) post?
faq.answer: The age limit for this post is between 21 years and 45 years, with age relaxation applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the ICAR-IARI Young Professional-II (YP-II) position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Young Professional-II (YP-II) role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR-IARI) located?
faq.answer: The institute is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110012.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity.

faq.question: Q10. What documents do I need to attach with my application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
